8.reason: [Using puts() adds a newline, but expected output requires only "error " followed by a space and no newline. Also, the problem expects all output on a single line.]

31.reason: [Using puts() outputs "error\n", but expected output is "error " (with a space and no newline). This breaks the required output format.]
